title: Does High-Definition UFO Footage Exist?
summary: This brief clip discusses the quality of publicly released UFO videos like Go Fast, Gimbal, and FLIR, with claims that the government possesses much higher quality footage including 4K ultra high-definition videos that have not been released to the public.

key_claims.claim: The publicly released videos (Go Fast, Gimbal, FLIR) are not high quality or high resolution and only show one sensor
The released videos were the least compelling of all videos the government has and were unclassified
The government possesses 4K ultra high-definition UFO footage that has not been released
The speaker has personally seen footage that defies any kind of logic or current science
